title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report May 11 2023
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report May 11 2023
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report May 11 2023
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 11/05/2023
DCE iron ore futures declined by 3.46 % today, the main contract closed at 698.5.The traders' willingness to ship is general.The steel mills are notactive to purchase.The overall trading sentiment of the market is less.PBF at Shandong port deal 765-778 yuan/mt,decrease 24- 27yuan/mt. PBF at Tangshan port deal 810 yuan/mt. Last night, the US CPI data was released below market expectations, but senƟment dissipated during the trading session last night.
